title: The entrance season.
manifestoTitle: A study of presence, heritage and modern Nigerian form.
manifestoCopy: This is an entrance into a new season of Moghene—where craft meets clarity. Each piece is a language of culture, cut for today, made to be remembered.

chapters.title: Arrival
chapters.copy: First light. New day. Designed for entrances that set the tone.

chapters.title: Rooted
chapters.copy: Heritage in full form. Grounded silhouettes. Living traditions.

chapters.title: After dark
chapters.copy: Evening ease. Sculptural shapes and deeper tones for unforgettable moments.
